name: Newburgh Beacon Bus Corp
principals: Edward F.X. Gallagher Jr. (President/CEO); founded by Frank X. Gallagher (1934)
service_types: shuttle (Newburgh-Beacon Bridge / Stewart Airport via Leprechaun Lines affiliate)
districts_or_customers: Newburgh Enlarged City School District (NECSD), New Windsor, Archdiocese of New York approved bus list; Newburgh-Beacon Bridge / Stewart Airport shuttle services
recent_news: Long-standing 90+ year family operator; Gallagher Bus Service / Newburgh Beacon Bus / Mid-State Bus operate under common Gallagher ownership; affiliated charter brand Leprechaun Lines still active (no public M&A activity)
website: leprechaunlines.com (affiliated; no dedicated NBB site found)
fit_notes: Strong tuck-in candidate: 90+ year independent family operator in Hudson Valley with second-generation leadership (Edward Gallagher Jr.) suggesting succession/exit potential; complementary school-bus + charter mix in a Summit-expansion NY market

name: Dairyland Hamilton Inc
owner_or_parent: Student Transportation of America (STA Family of Companies) - parent of National Express predecessor lineage; STA acquired Dairyland Buses Inc. in Nov 2011
principals: Lori Hartman (local manager); operates as part of The Dairyland Group under STA
fleet_size_est: part of Dairyland Group (700+ vehicles across 5 WI locations at time of 2011 acquisition)
districts_or_customers: Hamilton School District (Sussex/Lannon WI) and other Wisconsin districts via Dairyland Group network
recent_news: Dairyland Buses Inc. acquired by Student Transportation of America in November 2011 for ~$36M annualized revenue, 700+ vehicles, 5 locations; now branded 'Dairyland-Hamilton Bus Company, a member of the STA Family of Companies'
fit_notes: NOT a tuck-in target - already owned by Student Transportation of America (strategic competitor) since 2011; exclude from Summit pipeline

name: White Transit School Buses Inc
districts_or_customers: Greater Nanticoke Area School District (Luzerne County PA); awarded 15 Thomas Built Jouley electric buses under EPA Clean School Bus Program (Oct 2022)
recent_news: Selected by EPA Clean School Bus Program (Oct 2022) to receive 15 Thomas Built Jouley electric buses for the Nanticoke School District - notable EV transition validating district relationship and modern fleet posture
fit_notes: Solid small PA tuck-in: independent owner-operator with 32 buses serving Greater Nanticoke Area SD; EPA EV grant award demonstrates incumbency and modernization; PA is Summit expansion state - good geographic fit

name: Mutual Bus Corp
owner_or_parent: Vallone family enterprise (sister/affiliated entity to Vallo Transportation, Rolling V Bus Corp, VP Buses, Shuttle Bus Plus); Rolling V was acquired by Beacon Mobility (Audax-backed) in Nov 2023, but the Whitestone-based NYC entities appear separately held
principals: Phil Vallone (CEO, filed at South Fallsburg NY address); Vallone family - Ed Vallone's children/grandchildren (Linda, Phil, Ed Jr., Nick Vallone, Denise DeSabato-Pisapia)
districts_or_customers: Likely NYC DOE / Office of Pupil Transportation (OPT) routes; principal address at 151-17 6th Rd Whitestone (same site as Vallo Transportation, which shut down January 2021)
recent_news: NY DOS filed Oct 3, 2006; Phil Vallone listed as CEO at South Fallsburg address. Affiliated Vallo Transportation (same 151-17 Whitestone address) officially shut down Jan 14, 2021 due to COVID. Affiliated Rolling V Bus Corp (Catskills) acquired by Beacon Mobility Nov 2023 - status of remaining Whitestone NYC Vallone entities unclear
fit_notes: Caution / diligence flag: Vallone-family NYC entity at same Whitestone address as defunct Vallo Transportation (shut down Jan 2021). Affiliated Rolling V was sold to Beacon Mobility in Nov 2023. Mutual Bus may be a wind-down or successor entity; verify operating status with NYC OPT before pursuing - could be high-value succession deal or a defunct shell

name: Rolling Bus Corp
owner_or_parent: Vallone family enterprise (151-17 6th Rd Whitestone shared with Vallo Transportation [closed Jan 2021] and Mutual Bus Corp); Rolling V Bus Corp (Catskills sister) acquired by Beacon Mobility Nov 2023
principals: Vallone family (Ed Vallone's children and grandchildren - Linda, Phil, Ed Jr., Nick Vallone, Denise DeSabato-Pisapia)
districts_or_customers: Likely NYC DOE Office of Pupil Transportation (OPT) routes out of Whitestone, Queens
recent_news: Address (151-17 6th Rd, Whitestone) shared with Vallo Transportation, which officially shut down January 14, 2021 amid COVID. Affiliated Rolling V Bus Corp (Catskills) sold to Beacon Mobility (Audax) in November 2023. Rolling Bus Corp's specific status as separate entity not publicly confirmed - likely wind-down or successor
fit_notes: Diligence flag: Vallone-family NYC affiliate at same Whitestone address as defunct Vallo Transportation (closed Jan 2021); Catskills sister Rolling V already sold to Beacon Mobility (competitor). Verify operating status / NYC OPT contracts before outreach - may be a shell or wind-down entity rather than active operator. Avoid duplication with Mutual Bus Corp diligence; treat as a single Vallone-Whitestone cluster
